She is hardworking and kind.
She is friendly. She is smart.
He has short hair. He has glasses.
David is a hardworking manager.
What is she like? She is kind and quiet.
So, Maísa, who is on your team?
My manager is Carla. She is very smart and hardworking.
What is she like? Is she friendly?
Yes, she is. She is kind and patient with everyone.
Nice. And your colleagues?
I work with Bruno. He is quiet, but he is very smart.
Does he have glasses? I think I know him.
Yes, he does. He has short hair and glasses.
And what am I like? Be honest!
You are friendly and funny. And you are very confident!
My manager is smart and hardworking.
She is kind and patient with everyone.
He has short hair and glasses.
What is your boss like?
My colleague is quiet, but he is very smart.

Hello. Let me tell you about my boss, Mr. Reed. He is a great manager. He is very smart and hardworking. He is also patient and kind with the team. He has short gray hair and glasses. Every day, he helps us. He is friendly with everyone in the office. I like him a lot. What is your boss like?

Hi. This is my friend at work, Ana. She is very funny and friendly. She is smart, too. Ana is confident, and she is never nervous in a meeting. She has long dark hair. She is quiet in the morning, but she talks a lot at lunch. She is a good colleague and a good friend.
This is my manager, Carla. She is smart and kind. She has short hair. She is friendly with everyone.
